Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Copper]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Kelsa is currently a Copper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — A Copper sacred artist is a level of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — Copper is considered an average stage by the standards of the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Copper is a stage or rank.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — At the Copper stage, one can see aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — One of Lindon's cores has reached the Copper stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Copper is a stage of progression.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — A Copper is a type of currency or value in the region.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is Copper stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Copper is a level of strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Copper is a level of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Copper is a rank or status held by Tash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's core was transmuted from Copper to Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Copper is a stage of senses for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The Copper is dead and had reached Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Copper is a sense or rank mentioned by Lindon.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — A Copper stepping into the cave would have their air scorched and skin blackened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon was once at the Copper stage.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Coppers are people in the school who might be peeping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Copper is a stage or year of power.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — An Overlord is little better than a Copper on the scale of Monarchs and Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Coppers are individuals who can sweep.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
